name: Kinkajou
description:
Kinkajou is female RainWing and your clawmate at the Jade Mountain Academy. Kinkajou is bouncy, snarky, fierce, bright, immature, mischievous and she is fierce when it comes to protecting her friends.


Art by: frostedmonster
